title: libtiff security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[4.6.0-6.1]
- Fix buffer underflow in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented().
- Resolves: RHEL-112524
full_text:
[4.6.0-6.1]
- Fix buffer underflow in TIFFReadRGBAImageOriented().
- Resolves: RHEL-112524
